hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -q '/\.build/' && echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .build/ files — they are generated artifacts.' && exit 1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */software/scripts/*.js|*/software/scripts/*.sh) case "$f" in *.common.js|*.common.js|*/index.js|*/build-include.js|*/bootstrap/*) ;; *) basename_f=$(basename "$f"); case "$basename_f" in _*) ;; *) echo "Reminder: test with → bash run.sh --files=\"$basename_f\"" ;; esac ;; esac ;; esac; } || true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if script test reminder needed...

hooks.command: git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet || bash -c 'set -o pipefail; make validate 2>&1 | tail -20'
hooks.description: Run validate if there are uncommitted changes — non-zero exit wakes Claude to fix
